title: HudMini
description: A simple and lightweight mod that adds a few HUD elements
body:
![HudMini Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bac72169d169c295f2938e5e668e8078545ce40.png) ![Download](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/FSxxzmTL&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,) ![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=Available%20for&color=4bab62&query=version&url=https://api.blueish.dev/api/minecraft/version?id=FSxxzmTL) ![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/FSxxzmTL)
**A simple and lightweight mod** that adds a few HUD elements. Originally designed for personal use, it’s now available to the community with ongoing updates and additional features based on user feedback # ✨ Features - **Coordinates (with Nether Support)** - **Game Day & Time** - **IRL Time Display** - **Settings Section:** A settings section will be added soon to customize your HUD elements and preferences. Stay tuned for updates!
